subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I cannot praise Thee except through that which Thou hast praised Thyself, O Lord of the highest heavens! To Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لا احصی علیک الثناء الا بما اثنیت علی نفسک یا رب السموات العلی لک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
